animations.prompt:
Preserve exact character identity, design, proportions, colors, textures, materials, clothing details, silhouette, and pixel readability throughout all frames.

Generate a side-view 2D game sprite walk cycle animation. Character facing left. Create strong smooth walking motion with clear alternating leg movement and visible arm swings. Full stride treadmill-style walking cycle. Feet visibly lift and extend forward during each step. Arms swing opposite to legs in natural animation timing. Strong pose transitions between frames. Dynamic movement

Character remains perfectly centered in frame at all times. Fixed side camera. No camera movement, zoom, rotation, or perspective change. No drifting. No body warping. No extra limbs. No pose collapse.

Generate clean sequential animation frames only. Fluid continuous looping motion suitable for sprite sheet extraction and game animation. Consistent anatomy and proportions across all frames.

Maintain original color palette exactly. Flat sprite-style rendering. Uniform lighting. No relighting between frames.

 opaque chroma green background #2E8B57 with zero variation or artifacts. Background must not animate, flicker, gradient, glow, shift color, or change brightness.

Preserve exact character identity, design, proportions, colors, textures, materials, clothing details, silhouette, and pixel readability throughout all frames.

Generate a side-view 2D game sprite running animation. Character facing right. Fast explosive running motion with exaggerated leg stride and pumping arms. Full sprint treadmill-style running cycle. Knees lift high, feet push off with visible force. Arms drive forward and back in rhythm with legs. Strong dynamic pose transitions.

Character remains perfectly centered in frame at all times. Fixed side camera. No camera movement, zoom, rotation, or perspective change. No drifting. No body warping. No extra limbs. No pose collapse.

Primary request: generate a fluid looping run cycle with fast dynamic animation timing and readable keyframe motion.

2D游戏侧视图角色步行循环动画。角色面向左侧。采取夸张的步行姿态，腿部交替动作明显，手臂大幅摆动。跑步机式原位步行轨迹。每一步脚部都要清晰地提起并向前延伸。手臂与腿部呈反向摆动，符合自然动画节奏。强有力的关键帧转换，高振幅动态。

角色始终保持在画面中心。固定侧面视角相机。无镜头移动、缩放、旋转或透视变化。严禁身体变形、多余肢体或姿态崩溃。

仅生成连续、平滑的动画帧。动作流畅且可循环，适用于精灵图（Sprite Sheet）提取。所有帧的解剖结构和比例严格一致。

保持原始调色板。平面像素级渲染风格。光影统一，帧间无光影变动。

背景必须为纯色不透明铬绿色 #2E8B57，无噪点、无渐变、无闪烁。背景严禁任何颜色偏移或亮度变化。

核心要求：生成流畅循环的步行循环，动画节奏顺滑，关键帧动作清晰。
